title: Bartoline Ready Mixed Instant Filler 330g – Quick-Drying Tube Filler for Plaster, Wood, Brick & Stone Repairs (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
FAST & EASY REPAIRS: Instant use, ready-mixed formula in a convenient tube for direct, no-mess application
QUICK-DRYING PERFORMANCE: Dries rapidly and sands easily, making same-day decorating possible
SMOOTH WHITE FINISH: Provides a clean, paintable surface ideal for final decoration
MULTI-SURFACE COMPATIBILITY: Bonds well to plaster, plasterboard, wood, stone, and brick
INTERIOR & EXTERIOR USE: Can be used outside when sealed with oil-based paint or varnish
